notes: FROZEN (daemon=incapable). Gemini CLI 0.46.0 genuinely raises a plan-mode Plan Approval pause (exit_plan_mode tool held at awaiting_approval), but that → waiting transition is never persisted to the chat JSONL the daemon tails — awaiting_approval is in-memory/messageBus only; the transcript records tool calls solely at terminal status via recordCompletedToolCalls. No recording can verify the scenario's load-bearing single → waiting observable, so no phases are asserted. Same architectural blocker as the gemini-cli tool-gate-permission-prompt cell (and opposite of user-blocking-question, whose waiting is text-heuristic-driven and IS persisted).
